data.description: South Korean leader Lee: Dollar-won showing alignment with yen movement.

data.title: Crypto market plunges as Trump tariff threat spooks investors. Bitcoin's rally at risk as tensions rise.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are experiencing a downturn as US stocks and global markets respond to President Trump's recent announcement of imposing new tariffs. This development has caused concern among investors regarding the impact on various market sectors. The uncertainty surrounding these tariff threats has led to a sell-off in the crypto market, with Bitcoin's start-of-year recovery potentially being halted. This situation raises questions about the future trajectory of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies as they navigate these external market pressures.
South Korean leader Lee: Won depreciation milder compared with yen.

data.title: CFTC struggles with crypto mandate due to understaffing. Agency faces challenges amid shrinking workforce.
data.description: Increasing the scope of the CFTC's jurisdiction would necessitate hiring additional personnel, acquiring technical proficiency, and upgrading data infrastructure, all while the agency's staff numbers decline.

data.title: Mini Mall Storage Properties Trust plans to issue $650 million in senior unsecured debentures ($350M Series C and $300M Series D) by January 30, 2026 in Calgary.
data.description: A property trust company in Calgary, Alberta, known as Mini Mall Storage Properties Trust, disclosed plans to offer $650 million in total through the issuance of two sets of senior unsecured debentures. The offering comprises $350 million in Series C debentures and $300 million in Series D debentures, both priced at par. The completion of the Offering is projected around January 30, 2026, with the funds slated for utilization in the near future.
